_comment: Every overlay/backdrop/modal/sheet/menu surface (matched by overlaySurfaces.test.js scanning resources/css class selectors + resources/js string literals) must be registered here with its keyboard-focus wiring. Wiring values: containerManager (ContainerManager FOCUS_TRAP_CONTAINER_IDS trap) | trapModalFocus[:no-escape] (utilities/modalFocusTrap) | dialog (components/dialog/dialog.ts, itself trapped) | non-modal:<note> (interactive but intentionally untrapped — has Escape/focus handling as noted) | inert:<note> (non-interactive, no focusables) | deferred:<reason> (KNOWN DEBT — wire before shipping keyboard-facing changes there) | css-only:<note> (class exists only in CSS, no live JS surface). Adding a new overlay class without an entry FAILS the gate: wire a trap (see docs/a11y-findings.md 'Keyboard model') and register it.

ref-overlay.wiring: deferred:history-driven-close + edit-mode keyboard semantics need own design

hyperlit-overlay.wiring: deferred:history-driven-close + edit-mode keyboard semantics need own design

stale-tab-overlay.wiring: deferred:cross-tab warning overlay — wire trapModalFocus when next touched

ai-review-viz-overlay.wiring: deferred:AI-review viz — wire trapModalFocus when next touched

conversion-modal.wiring: deferred:paste conversion progress — wire when next touched

import-failure-modal.wiring: deferred:import failure report — wire when next touched (also still .js)

novel-vacuum-overlay.wiring: deferred:paste novel-vacuum flow — wire when next touched

reconvert-blocking-overlay.wiring: inert:blocking wait overlay during reconvert handoff, no focusables

page-drop-overlay.wiring: inert:drag-drop hint, display none until OS drag

progress-modal.wiring: css-only:no live JS creator found; prune the CSS or register the module when revived
